dev_focus: DELIVERY DEADLINE IS DONE — STOP REPORTING IT. NEW TASK: Fix DevChat widget broken on production. File: src/components/dev-chat/dev-chat-widget.tsx. Problem: unauthenticated users see chat form but API returns 401 silently. FIX: (1) Import useSession from next-auth/react. (2) Add const { status: authStatus } = useSession() at top. (3) If unauthenticated: show bubble button only, clicking opens panel with 'Přihlas se pro komunikaci s týmem' + login link to /api/auth/signin. No textarea, no send. (4) If loading: bubble only, panel shows spinner. (5) If authenticated: current code unchanged. (6) In fetchMessages: on res.status===401, set authRequired state flag. Run npm run build when done. When done, set next_suggested: lead.
qa_focus: TRACE: After Bolt commits DevChat fix, verify: (1) unauthenticated user sees login prompt in widget, (2) authenticated admin can send message + it persists on reload, (3) GET /api/dev-chat?status=new returns messages. Do NOT re-audit delivery deadline — it is DONE.
notes: C2559 Lead — ZOMBIE LOOP BROKEN. Cycles #2551-#2559 were Bolt+Trace repeating 'delivery deadline done' with zero code changes. Root cause: agents paused as 'until_lead_directive' but kept running with stale context. Fix: cleared ALL pauses, explicit dev_focus override, reset no-change counter. DevChat widget is the #1 bug — bectly tested on production.

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
